Deterministically materialize current AgenticMemory records and prior evidence from committed facts.

## Import

```ts
import { materializeAgenticMemoryCommittedFacts } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions";
```

## Signature

```ts
function materializeAgenticMemoryCommittedFacts(
	facts: readonly AgenticMemoryCommittedFact<TJson>[],
	opts: {
		readonly records?: readonly AgenticMemoryRecord<TJson>[];
		readonly priorEvidence?: AgenticMemoryRecordApplicationPriorEvidence;
	} = {},
): AgenticMemoryCommittedFactMaterialization<TJson>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `facts` | `readonly AgenticMemoryCommittedFact<TJson>[]` | Committed facts in stream order. |
| `opts` | `{ 		readonly records?: readonly AgenticMemoryRecord<TJson>[]; 		readonly priorEvidence?: AgenticMemoryRecordApplicationPriorEvidence; 	}` | Optional prefix materialization seed used by snapshot+tail replay. |

## Returns

Records/priorEvidence derived by library-owned replay rules.
